summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All listed open PRs are preserved for independent maintainer review or proof follow-up; the one hydrated security-sensitive linked ref is routed only to central security handling.

actions.reason: Valid independent PR surface with maintainer/rebase follow-up; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Clearly related to the hydrated open cron-reminder issue, but the job disallows merge/fix and proof/technical acceptance remains a maintainer decision.
Related to the memory-gate runtime family and likely the active PR path, but open review/author-change state prevents closure or merge planning.
Related to the open Codex log-retention issue but not closable or mergeable under this inventory-only plan.
Related to the open StepFun image provider issue; keep for proof/product review rather than closing or treating as canonical.
Security-sensitive linked ref is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.
